product_page.title_descriptor: Flame Retardant, Antistatic, High Visible, Safety Jacket Fabric
product_page.page_title: Flame Retardant, Antistatic, High Visible, Safety Jacket Fabric - ArNeo Flame + Static Pro - Ariteks
product_page.spec_line: 150 g/m², 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, High Visible, Flame Retardant
description_blocks: Antistatic Knit Fabric ArNeo Pro is 99% polyester 1% carbon, 150 g/m² warp knitted flame retardant, antistatic, neon colored fabric for safety jackets.
It is mostly used by aeroport apron workers also for oil and gas industries.
Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
Flame retardant certified. (TS EN ISO 14116) (resistant to 10 washing)

technical_documents.label: >> ArNeo Flame Static Pro Data Sheet

images.alt: Flame Retardant Antistatic Fluorescent Warp Knit Fabric
images.title: Flame Retardant Antistatic Fluorescent Warp Knit Fabric
images.context_text: ArNeo Pro is 99% polyester 1% carbon, 150 g/m² warp knitted flame retardant, antistatic, neon colored fabric for safety jackets. It is mostly used by aeroport apron workers also for oil and gas industries. EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. Antistatic certified. (EN ISO 1149) (inherent antistatic) Flame retardant certified. (TS EN ISO 14116) (resistant to 10 washing)

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
150 g/m² , 99% Polyester 1% Carbon, High Visible, Flame Retardant, Antistatic Knit Fabric

ArNeo Pro is 99% polyester 1% carbon, 150 g/m² warp knitted flame retardant, antistatic, neon colored fabric for safety jackets. It is mostly used by aeroport apron workers also for oil and gas industries. EN ISO 20471 certified. Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light. As a result they shine more than other objects. Antistatic certified. (EN ISO 1149) (inherent antistatic) Flame retardant certified. ArNeo Pro is 99% polyester 1% carbon, 150 g/m² warp knitted flame retardant, antistatic, neon colored fabric for safety jackets.
It is mostly used by aeroport apron workers also for oil and gas industries.

Neon dyed fabrics they attract more attention than other colors. They absorb uv light and reflect as a visible light.
As a result they shine more than other objects.
